global.title: Subaru’s new EVs are already outselling the Solterra
global.summary: Just months after arriving at dealerships, Subaru’s new electric SUVs are outselling the Solterra.

global.title: Kempower + PowerUp kick off a 12-site EV fast charging rollout
global.summary: Kempower and charge point operator PowerUp America have opened a new public DC fast charging station in Manchester, Kentucky – the first of 12 charging projects the companies are building together in the Southeast.

global.title: Ford’s $30,000 EV pickup captured testing again as new details emerge
global.summary: Ford’s midsize electric pickup was spotted testing again, revealing a few new details and a sneak peek at the interior.

global.title: Toyota’s electric SUV clears 17,500 sales, outpacing the Land Cruiser and key EV rivals
global.summary: The new 2026 bZ has emerged as one of America’s best-selling EVs, outselling several of Toyota’s popular SUVs.

global.title: Sicily is now home to Italy’s largest solar farm
global.summary: Italy’s largest solar farm is now online, giving the country another boost in clean power as it races to add more renewable energy.

global.title: Tesla Semi involved in first fatal crash, killing 2 in Nevada
global.summary: A Tesla Semi was involved in its first known fatal crash, killing two people on U.S. 50 in Nevada on Sunday morning. The driver of the Class 8 electric truck reportedly fell asleep before rear-ending two passenger vehicles stopped at a red light, according to preliminary statements from investigator

global.title: Juiced Scrambler e-bikes at new lows from $1,694, Baseus X1 Pro solar security camera $140, Greenworks 80V CrossoverZ bundle, more
global.summary: We’ve got a collection of post-Prime and July 4th savings stuffed into our midweek Green Deals, led by the Juiced 4th of July Sale on its two Scrambler Moto-Style e-bike variants + a $245 FREE bundle at new lows starting from $1,694. Right behind it is the Baseus X1 Pro Wireless Outdoor Dual-Trackin

global.title: Chevy Equinox EV sales slide 41%, but the new Bolt and Cadillac EVs pick up the slack
global.summary: GM’s best-selling Chevy Equinox EV took a hit after sales dropped 41% in the first half of 2026. The new Chevy Bolt EV and Cadillac’s luxury electric SUVs helped soften the blow.

global.title: Hyundai sold over 20,000 IONIQ 5 EVs in the first half of 2026, and IONIQ 9 sales are up 380%
global.summary: The IONIQ 5 continues to rack up impressive sales, topping 20,000 in the first half of 2026. Meanwhile, Hyundai’s three-row electric SUV is gaining traction, with sales up 380%.

global.title: Kia’s midsize electric SUV gains AWD and a special new ‘Storm’ edition
global.summary: The new Storm edition variant offers “more bang for your buck,” Kia said after introducing the new special edition model.
